projects/ — shipped

Things I’ve built.

Real projects — deployed, used, and linked to source code. Click any card to see the demo, screenshots, and details.

01 / AGENT
Aria — Google Workspace Agent
Conversational agent that controls Gmail, Docs, Calendar, and Drive through a single natural-language interface. Includes an Agent Builder for deploying custom sub-agents without code, using an orchestrator/sub-agent architecture. Built at Google AI Seekho Hackathon.
$ Orchestrator / sub-agent architecture
$ Google ADK + Vertex AI
$ No-code Agent Builder
Gemini 2.5 Pro
Google ADK
Vertex AI
Firebase
github →
02 / MULTI-AGENT · 1ST PLACE
Ciro — Urban Incident Response
Multi-agent system that detects and responds to urban issues — floods, road blockages, and live traffic — in real time. Built on an Orchestrator/Planner/Executor pattern. Won 1st place at Zab-e-Fest out of 200+ competing teams.
$ Orchestrator / Planner / Executor
$ Real-time incident detection
$ Multi-LLM routing (Claude, Gemini, GPT-4)
Python
Multi-Agent
LLMs
github →
03 / MULTI-AGENT · EDTECH
Logic Land
Gamified platform that teaches kids coding concepts through play. A multi-agent system (MAS) assesses each child's skill level and generates Q&A tailored to it in real time. Designed the agent workflow and overall agent architecture.
$ Multi-agent skill assessment
$ Adaptive Q&A generation
$ Gamified learning loop
Multi-Agent
Agent Architecture
github →
04 / FULL-STACK
Hackify — Hackathon Aggregator
Tracks current and upcoming hackathons across the platforms that matter. Grew from a simple RSS feed question into a full PWA with a Python backend, database, and automated scraping pipeline that notifies users the moment a new hackathon drops.
> 7 scrapers · Devpost, MLH, HackerEarth…
> GitHub Actions cron, every 4h
> PWA — offline + install prompt
FastAPI
Supabase
PWA
github → live →
05 / AI TOOL
Video Subtitle Translator
Real-time subtitle transcription and translation for YouTube and Dailymotion videos, with embedded output.
GPT-4
Whisper AI
06 / AUTOMATION
Novel Translation Workflow
n8n workflow that automates translating novel chapters end-to-end — ingesting source text, running it through an LLM translation step, and outputting formatted, publish-ready chapters.
07 / AI PRODUCT
AI To-Do Assistant
A to-do list with Mistral AI-powered suggestions that prioritize tasks and generate smart daily schedules, with premium features unlocked via Solana blockchain payments.
React
Node.js
Mistral AI
Solana
github →

you.

FEATURED — AGENTIC AI
Agentic AI
I design, build, and work with multi-agent systems — orchestrators, specialist agents, memory, and everything that connects them.
01
Backend Development
